'''ngachoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:seabreeze|seabreeze]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-ch-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:seabreeze|seabreeze]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngachoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæcheyeth|ngæcheyeth]] || [[word:ngæcheyej|ngæcheyej]] || [[word:ngæcheyesh|ngæcheyesh]] || [[word:ngæcheye|ngæcheye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngachochoyoth|ngachochoyoth]] || [[word:ngachochoyoj|ngachochoyoj]] || [[word:ngachochoyosh|ngachochoyosh]] || [[word:ngachochoyo|ngachochoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngachoyoth|ngachoyoth]] || [[word:ngachoyoj|ngachoyoj]] || [[word:ngachoyosh|ngachoyosh]] || [[word:ngachoyo|ngachoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngachofyoth|ngachofyoth]] || [[word:ngachofyoj|ngachofyoj]] || [[word:ngachofyosh|ngachofyosh]] || [[word:ngachofyof|ngachofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngachoyotho|ngachoyotho]] || [[word:ngachoyojo|ngachoyojo]] || [[word:ngachoyosho|ngachoyosho]] || [[word:ngachoyoko|ngachoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngachoyoth|ngachoyoth]] || [[word:ngachoyoj|ngachoyoj]] || [[word:ngachoyosh|ngachoyosh]] || [[word:ngachoyo|ngachoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngachoyothol|ngachoyothol]] || [[word:ngachoyojol|ngachoyojol]] || [[word:ngachoyoshol|ngachoyoshol]] || [[word:ngachoyokol|ngachoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngachoyothotho|ngachoyothotho]] || [[word:ngachoyojojo|ngachoyojojo]] || [[word:ngachoyoshosho|ngachoyoshosho]] || [[word:ngachoyoko|ngachoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngachoyothon|ngachoyothon]] || [[word:ngachoyojon|ngachoyojon]] || [[word:ngachoyoshon|ngachoyoshon]] || [[word:ngachoyokon|ngachoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngachoyothoro|ngachoyothoro]] || [[word:ngachoyojoro|ngachoyojoro]] || [[word:ngachoyoshoro|ngachoyoshoro]] || [[word:ngachoyokoro|ngachoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
